title: Savory Sesame Jamaican Shrimp Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Jamaican dish featuring succulent shrimp, nutty sesame seeds, and a rich curry sauce, all cooked to perfection in a cataplana vessel, perfect for a romantic date night, this dairy-free friendly recipe is sure to impress
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in the cataplana vessel over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for an additional minute
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 5 minutes
Stir in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally
Stir in the sesame seeds and season with salt and black pepper to taste
Serve the curry hot, garnished with additional sesame seeds if desired
